item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8398-3: nginx vulnerability
item.description:
🚨 USN-8398-3: nginx vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The update caused a regression and was temporarily reverted in USN-8398-2. This update introduces a complete fix for CVE-2026-49975. Original advisory details: It was discovered that nginx incorrectly handled certain cookie headers in the HTTP/2 implementation. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause nginx to consume excessive resources, resulting in a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8398-3

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2016-20066 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2016-20066 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
WordPress CP Polls 1.0.8 contains a persistent cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows attackers to inject malicious scripts through unsanitized file upload functionality. Attackers can upload files containing script payloads with event handlers like onerror attributes to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the browsers of users viewing the affected content.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2016-20066

item.title: [Segurança] Palo Alto Warns of Active Exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN Flaw
item.description:
🚨 Palo Alto Warns of Active Exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN Flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Palo Alto Networks has revealed that it has observed "active exploitation" of a recently disclosed PAN-OS vulnerability by an unknown threat actor to obtain unauthorized access to GlobalProtect portals. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-0257 (CVSS score: 7.8), an authentication bypass flaw affecting the portal and gateway components of PAN-OS software that could be exploited by bad
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/palo-alto-warns-of-active-exploitation.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8405-2: CUPS regression
item.description:
🚨 USN-8405-2: CUPS regression
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The update introduced a regression that cause CUPS to crash when parsing certain large printer PPD files. Original advisory details: Ariel Silver discovered that CUPS incorrectly handled username comparisons during authorization checks. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to gain unauthorized access to restricted operations. (CVE-2026-27447) Asim Viladi Oglu Manizada discovered that CUPS incorrectly handle...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8405-2

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-8385 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-8385 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The WP Go Maps WordPress plugin before 10.0.10 does not properly enforce the marker approval filter on the admin-ajax fallback for its datatables route, allowing unauthenticated visitors to retrieve marker records that the site owner has not approved for public display, including their title, category, address and description fields.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8385

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-15546 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-15546 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Iptanus File Upload WordPress plugin before 5.1.7 does not implement proper file handling when the duplicatepolicy setting is configured to "maintain both." Due to a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition between the file existence check and the actual file write operation, an authenticated attacker can overwrite files uploaded by other users.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15546

item.title: [Segurança] ⚡ Weekly Recap: Chrome 0-Day, UniFi Exploits, macOS Stealers, VPN Flaw and More
item.description:
💣 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Chrome 0-Day, UniFi Exploits, macOS Stealers, VPN Flaw and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A deprecated feature was still running in prod. This week is the same lesson in a new form: phishing kits are easier to rent, AI names are useful bait, old login paths still fail, and forgotten software keeps becoming someone else's entry point.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/weekly-recap-chrome-0-day-unifi.html

item.title: [Segurança] New attack turned Microsoft 365 Copilot into 1-click data theft tool
item.description:
📰 New attack turned Microsoft 365 Copilot into 1-click data theft tool
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability chain dubbed SearchLeak in Microsoft 365 Copilot Enterprise could allow attackers to steal sensitive data from a target's mailbox, OneDrive, or SharePoint account through a specially crafted URL.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-attack-turned-microsoft-365-copilot-into-1-click-data-theft-tool/

item.title: [Segurança] Chinese hackers breach REDCap servers, steal medical research
item.description:
📰 Chinese hackers breach REDCap servers, steal medical research
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A China-linked espionage campaign targeted exposed REDCap servers to deploy the InfiniteRed malware and steal sensitive data from a medical institution in North America.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/chinese-hackers-breach-redcap-servers-steal-medical-research/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8428-1: tmux vulnerability
item.description:
📰 USN-8428-1: tmux vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that tmux incorrectly handled image cleanup, leading to a use-after-free vulnerability. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to cause tmux to crash, resulting in a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8428-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] New attack turned Microsoft 365 Copilot into 1-click data theft tool - BleepingComputer
item.description:
📰 New attack turned Microsoft 365 Copilot into 1-click data theft tool - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Webinar: How behavioral AI stops phishing and account takeovers
item.description:
📰 Webinar: How behavioral AI stops phishing and account takeovers
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Modern phishing, BEC, and account takeover attacks increasingly bypass traditional email defenses and create operational strain for security teams. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help automate detection, investigation, and remediation to reduce alert fatigue and accelerate response times.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/webinar-how-behavioral-ai-stops-phishing-and-account-takeovers/

item.title: [Segurança] Popular WordPress Plugin Scripts Tampered to Plant Hidden Backdoors on Sites
item.description:
📰 Popular WordPress Plugin Scripts Tampered to Plant Hidden Backdoors on Sites
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An attacker tampered with trusted JavaScript files used by WordPress sites running PushEngage, OptinMonster, and TrustPulse, turning those files into a way to break into the sites. When a site administrator was logged in as the file loaded, the code created an admin account under the attacker's control and installed a hidden plugin that opened a way back in.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/popular-wordpress-plugin-scripts.html
